title: God Origin
description: a custom origin for the origins mod
body:
this adds a new origin to the origins mod

you start out as Child of God, and once you've killed the ender dragon and the wither you become god

the child of god has a lot more health, does more damage, can fly like elytra, and can walk on water

god is invulnerable, does a lot more damage than the CoG, can fly like creative, and can walk on water

cool
